name: Mickleover

locations.address:
Pear Tree Enquiry Office,
Pear Tree Section,
Pear Tree Road,
Derby,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Mickleover. It belongs to the Derby West policing section.

Mickleover comprises of what is described as the original area of Mickleover which was developed between the 1930s and 1960s.
